---
title: "Validate v7 Output"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
library(data.table)

# Paths
script_path <- "Code/merge_datasets_v7.Rmd"
point_out <- "Datasets/Clean/Combined/Updated_Crime_Enriched_PointLevel_v7.csv"

# Expected date window from v7
expected_start <- as.Date("2006-01-01")
expected_end   <- as.Date("2024-12-31")

checks <- data.table(
  check = character(),
  status = character(),
  detail = character()
)

add_check <- function(name, pass, detail) {
  checks <<- rbind(
    checks,
    data.table(
      check = name,
      status = ifelse(isTRUE(pass), "PASS", "FAIL"),
      detail = as.character(detail)
    )
  )
}
```

```{r metadata-checks, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
# 1) File existence
script_exists <- file.exists(script_path)
out_exists <- file.exists(point_out)

add_check("v7 script exists", script_exists, script_path)
add_check("output CSV exists", out_exists, point_out)

if (script_exists && out_exists) {
  s_info <- file.info(script_path)
  o_info <- file.info(point_out)

  add_check(
    "output newer than v7 script",
    o_info$mtime >= s_info$mtime,
    paste0("output mtime=", o_info$mtime, " | script mtime=", s_info$mtime)
  )

  add_check(
    "output file non-empty",
    is.finite(o_info$size) && o_info$size > 0,
    paste0("size bytes=", format(o_info$size, scientific = FALSE))
  )
}
```

```{r data-checks, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
if (out_exists) {
  required_cols <- c(
    "crime_date", "latitude", "longitude",
    "closure_count_100m", "closure_dist_min", "event_count"
  )

  # Read only needed columns for speed on large files
  dt <- fread(point_out, select = required_cols, showProgress = TRUE)

  # 2) Required columns
  missing_cols <- setdiff(required_cols, names(dt))
  add_check(
    "required columns present",
    length(missing_cols) == 0,
    if (length(missing_cols) == 0) "all present" else paste(missing_cols, collapse = ", ")
  )

  # 3) Row count
  add_check("row count > 0", nrow(dt) > 0, paste0("rows=", nrow(dt)))

  # 4) Date parse + window
  dt[, crime_date := as.Date(crime_date)]
  bad_date_n <- dt[is.na(crime_date), .N]
  min_date <- dt[, suppressWarnings(min(crime_date, na.rm = TRUE))]
  max_date <- dt[, suppressWarnings(max(crime_date, na.rm = TRUE))]

  add_check("no unparseable crime_date", bad_date_n == 0, paste0("bad_date_rows=", bad_date_n))
  add_check(
    "crime_date within expected window",
    isTRUE(min_date >= expected_start) && isTRUE(max_date <= expected_end),
    paste0("min=", min_date, " | max=", max_date)
  )

  # 5) Coordinate validity
  zero_lat_n <- dt[!is.na(latitude) & latitude == 0, .N]
  zero_lon_n <- dt[!is.na(longitude) & longitude == 0, .N]

  add_check("zero latitude count = 0", zero_lat_n == 0, paste0("zero_lat=", zero_lat_n))
  add_check("zero longitude count = 0", zero_lon_n == 0, paste0("zero_lon=", zero_lon_n))

  # 6) Enrichment sanity checks (should not all be empty/zero)
  closure_max <- dt[, suppressWarnings(max(closure_count_100m, na.rm = TRUE))]
  event_max <- dt[, suppressWarnings(max(event_count, na.rm = TRUE))]
  closure_dist_nonmissing <- dt[!is.na(closure_dist_min), .N]

  add_check("closure_count_100m has matches", is.finite(closure_max) && closure_max > 0, paste0("max=", closure_max))
  add_check("event_count has matches", is.finite(event_max) && event_max > 0, paste0("max=", event_max))
  add_check("closure_dist_min has non-missing", closure_dist_nonmissing > 0, paste0("non_missing=", closure_dist_nonmissing))
}
```

```{r summary, echo=FALSE}
print(checks)

overall_pass <- all(checks$status == "PASS")
cat("\n==============================\n")
cat("VALIDATION RESULT:\n")
cat("DONE =", ifelse(overall_pass, "YES", "NO"), "\n")
cat("==============================\n")

if (!overall_pass) {
  cat("\nFailed checks:\n")
  print(checks[status == "FAIL"])
}
```
